2603.28325.title: Building evidence-based knowledge graphs from full-text literature for disease-specific biomedical reasoning
2603.28325.paper_summary: Biomedical knowledge resources often either preserve evidence as unstructured text or compress it into flat triples that omit study design, provenance, and quantitative support. Here we present EvidenceNet, a framework and dataset for building disease-specific knowledge graphs from full-text biomedical literature. EvidenceNet uses a large language model (LLM)-assisted pipeline to extract experimentally grounded findings as structured evidence nodes, normalize biomedical entities, score evidence quality, and connect evidence records through typed semantic relations. We release two resources: EvidenceNet-HCC with 7,872 evidence records, 10,328 graph nodes, and 49,756 edges, and EvidenceNet-CRC with 6,622 records, 8,795 nodes, and 39,361 edges. Technical validation shows high component fidelity, including 98.3% field-level extraction accuracy, 100.0% high-confidence entity-link accuracy, 87.5% fusion integrity, and 90.0% semantic relation-type accuracy. In downstream evaluation, EvidenceNet improves internal and external retrieval-augmented question answering and retains structural signal for future link prediction and target prioritization. These results establish EvidenceNet as a disease-specific resource for evidence-aware biomedical reasoning and hypothesis generation.
2603.28325.paper_summary_zh: 生物醫學知識資源通常要麼以非結構化文本的形式保存證據，要麼將其壓縮成省略研究設計、來源和定量支持的平面三元組。在此，我們介紹EvidenceNet，一個從全文生物醫學文獻中構建疾病特定知識圖譜的框架和數據集。EvidenceNet使用大型語言模型（LLM）輔助的管道來提取實驗基礎的發現作為結構化的證據節點，標準化生物醫學實體，評分證據質量，並通過類型化的語義關係連接證據記錄。我們發布了兩個資源：EvidenceNet-HCC，擁有7,872條證據記錄、10,328個圖節點和49,756條邊，以及EvidenceNet-CRC，擁有6,622條記錄、8,795個節點和39,361條邊。技術驗證顯示出高組件保真度，包括98.3%的字段級提取準確性、100.0%的高信心實體鏈接準確性、87.5%的融合完整性和90.0%的語義關係類型準確性。在下游評估中，EvidenceNet改善了內部和外部檢索增強的問題回答，並保留了未來鏈接預測和目標優先級的結構信號。這些結果確立了EvidenceNet作為一個針對證據感知生物醫學推理和假設生成的疾病特定資源。
2603.28325.author: Chang Zong et.al.
2603.28325.authors: Chang Zong, Sicheng Lv, Si-tu Xue, Huilin Zheng, Jian Wan, Lei Zhang
